2) 'I was born after a brother who passed away before my
birth'. Only Sa in 3rd could cause it. Ve in 3rd also says
that you will lose a brother and that will live away from
brothers. Means your Asc should be Cp. (Ra in 3rd
indicates that you should have a small mole/mark in neck,
verify it).
3) If Ke is in 9th, one should earn income from abroad, as
per the text Chamatkara chintamani. Means your Asc is
Cp. (Should have some delay or trouble in having children,
should try to marry from a caste little lower than his own.
Of these I know that the 2nd occurred, what about the
first?)

90 Secrets o( Birth Time Rectification
[Note: The client later informed me that the first is also
true].
4) If Asc is Cp then Su in 2nd. As per Bhrigu sutram sun in
2nd should cause some opposing decision from Govt at
the age of25. (1969+25=1995). Means your Asc is Cp.
5) As per Chamathkara Chintamani Su in 2nd should give
